overview: Rakdos Midrange in Modern leverages efficient removal and board control to outvalue opponents over multiple turns. By combining targeted disruption with creature-based pressure, the deck aims to stabilize early and close games with resilient threats. The provided signature cards exemplify this approach through board wipes, life drain, and flexible interaction.
win_conditions: Trading up with Orcish Bowmasters to clear opposing boards while preserving life total
Using Moonshadow to enable aggressive pushes with smaller creatures while restricting opponent blockers
Grinding out life with Burning Inquiry to force unfavorable trades and close games

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two lands and a removal spell or early creature
Draws containing Burning Inquiry or Orcish Bowmasters paired with mana sources
Combinations that allow for immediate board presence or disruption
mulligan_criteria: Mana screws with three or more lands and no interaction
Hands lacking removal or early game answers
Draws with only high-cost cards and no ramp or draw

early_game: Play lands and deploy early creatures to establish board presence
Use Burning Inquiry to disrupt opponent's opening turns and gain life
Hold removal for key threats while developing your own board
mid_game: Utilize Orcish Bowmasters to clear opposing boards and generate value
Cast Moonshadow to restrict blocking and push damage with your creatures
Trade efficiently to maintain board advantage while drawing into more resources
late_game: Stabilize with resilient threats and card advantage engines
Use life gain from Burning Inquiry to outlast attrition strategies
Close out games with efficient removal and board control

key_cards.name: Orcish Bowmasters
key_cards.notes: Cast on opponent's turn or when they have multiple creatures to maximize the death trigger. Use it to clear blockers before attacking or to remove key threats while preserving your life total.

key_cards.name: Moonshadow
key_cards.role: Board state manipulation and aggression enabler
key_cards.notes: Play when you have multiple small creatures to bypass blockers. Use it to force unfavorable trades and push damage through while restricting opponent's combat options.

key_cards.name: Burning Inquiry
key_cards.notes: Use to scout opponent's hand or library for key cards. Prioritize targeting high-value spells or threats. The life gain helps stabilize against aggressive decks and extends your game length.

sequencing_tips: Hold Burning Inquiry for opponent's key spells or when you need life to survive a push
Cast Orcish Bowmasters after opponent commits to a board state to maximize the death trigger
Play Moonshadow before attacking to force opponent to commit blockers or concede damage
Prioritize removal on threats that can't be blocked efficiently
Manage life total carefully to avoid being burned out by opponent's finishers

matchups.advice: Prioritize life gain with Burning Inquiry and use Orcish Bowmasters to clear early boards. Play Moonshadow to restrict their aggressive pushes and buy time for your midrange threats.
Apply steady pressure with creatures and use removal to clear their counterspells or sweepers. Burn through their resources with efficient trades and close games before they stabilize.

Disrupt their key pieces with Burning Inquiry and hold removal for their combo enablers. Use Orcish Bowmasters to clear their board if they go wide, and apply pressure to force them to play around you.
